## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Protocol Reference

Link to the relevant RFC, extension specification, or registry documentation.

## Compatibility

- [ ] Public API remains backward compatible.
- [ ] No registry-specific behavior was added to reusable protocol packages.
- [ ] Existing SDK behavior is unchanged unless documented.

## Quality

- [ ] `gofmt -w .`
- [ ] `go vet ./...`
- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `go build ./...`

## Notes

Include any operational or registry compatibility notes.
